title: Anton (disambiguation)
content:
'''Anton''' can refer to the following individuals:

*'''[[Anton Brunwin]]''', [[Twin/Legends|twin]] brother of [[Sturn Brunwin]].
*'''[[Anton Kale]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]].
*'''[[Anton Saar]]''', author of ''[[Of Droids and Men]]''.
*'''[[Anton Standish]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Sector fleet]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]].

{{Disambig}}
